name: google-ads-setup
description: Google Ads campaign SETUP / build skills for Inbound CPH: take a new client from research to a launch-ready campaign. Phase-1 research (landing-page-analyzer, competitor-research, campaign-strategy, semrush-research [gated: keyword volume/difficulty/CPC + organic rankings + trends when a Semrush plan is connected, degrades to theme-derived otherwise]), Phase-2 structuring (ad-groups + keywords + negatives gate), Phase-3 creative (rsa-copywriter + assets), Phase-4 assembler (merges all four into the 10-tab workbook + Editor CSVs, no API push), plus responsive-search-ads (the RSA copy engine the build reuses). Initialization-focused: no live-account optimization here (see google-ads-optimization). Danish-default.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
